LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CYNIA SIMPKINS' AMENDED MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNDERINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS HELD ON APR-12-2017. THE COURT APPOINTED EVERETT HEWLETT JR. TO BE THE ARBITRATOR IN THIS CASE SINCE THE PARTIES WERE UNABLE TO SELECT ONE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: LAURA A. REDING, CSR 	711 =302/HK
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 60229578) FILED BY PETITIONER SIMPKINS, CYNIA C.
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 60244584) FILED BY PETITIONER SIMPKINS, CYNIA C.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-17-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CYNIA SIMPKINS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNDERINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BEING REFILED. BASED ON THE PROOF OF SERVICE OF THE PETITION FILED BY MS. SIMPKINS, IT APPEARS THAT MS. SIMPKINS SOUGHT TO SERVE RESPONDENT STATE FARM PER CCP 1290.4(B)(2). HOWEVER, SERVICE WAS NOT PROPERLY DONE IN ACCORDANCE WITH THAT STATUTE FOR TWO REASONS. FIRST, THE PROOF OF SERVICE DOES NOT INCLUDE A RETURN RECEIPT. SECOND, LESS THAN THIRTY DAYS HAS ELAPSED SINCE THE MAILING OF THE PETITION TO STATE FARM. PREVAILING PARTY SHALL PREPARE FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189

OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR FOR UNDERINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM; NON-OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION; DECLARATION OF COUNSEL (TRANSACTION ID # 60362267) FILED BY RESPONDENT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

DECLARATION OF GERALDINE ARMENDARIZ IN REPLY TO RESPONDENTS OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR FOR UNINSURED MOTORIST CLAIM NON-OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION (TRANSACTION ID # 60386409) FILED BY PETITIONER SIMPKINS, CYNIA C.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER CYNIA SIMPKINS' AMENDED MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNDERINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 12, 2017 TO GIVE THE PARTIES AN OPPORTUNITY TO SELECT A SINGLE ARBITRATOR. PER CCP 1281.6, IF THE PARTIES HAVE NOT SELECTED AN ARBITRATOR BEFORE THE HEARING ON APRIL 12, AT THAT HEARING THE COURT WILL APPOINT AN ARBITRATOR AMONG THE FOLLOWING FIVE PERSONS NOMINATED BY THE COURT, ALL OF WHOM ARE ON THE PANEL OF ADR SERVICES, INC.'S PANEL OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NEUTRALS: 1) CHRISTOPHER COTTLE; 2) EVERETT HEWLETT, JR.; 3) CLAUDIA LONG; 4) RICHARD ROGGIA; AND 5) JAMES TREMBATH. ANY DISPUTES REGARDING DISCOVERY AND SCHEDULING OF THE ARBITRATION WILL BE DECIDED BY THE ARBITRATOR. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: KELLY DEYOUNG, CSR 6780 (KDEYOUNG@SFTC.ORG) (302)

Amended Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration And To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators
Off Calendar Apr-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. GERALDINE ARMENDAIZ, TEL. NO. 1-415-986-0873 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. VADIM A. NEBUCHIN OF THE PHILIP ANDERSEN AND ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 1-925-225-6838 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER CYNIA SIMPKINS' Amended Motion For Order To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration And To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators - The court appointed Everett Hewlett Jr. to be the arbitrator in this case since the parties were unable to select one. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Laura A. Reding, CSR 711 =302/hk

Amended Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration And To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Continued To Apr-12-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CYNIA SIMPKINS' AMENDED MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL UNDERINSURED MOTORIST ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT A PANEL OF ARBITRATORS.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: continued to April 12, 2017 to give the parties an opportunity to select a single arbitrator. Per CCP 1281.6, if the parties have not selected an arbitrator before the hearing on April 12, at that hearing the court will appoint an arbitrator among the following five persons nominated by the court, all of whom are on the panel of ADR Services, Inc.'s panel of Northern California neutrals: 1) Christopher Cottle; 2) Everett Hewlett, Jr.; 3) Claudia Long; 4) Richard Roggia; and 5) James Trembath. Any disputes regarding discovery and scheduling of the arbitration will be decided by the arbitrator. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelly DeYoung, CSR 6780 (kdeyoung@sftc.org) (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion For Order To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration And To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators
Off Calendar Mar-17-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER CYNIA SIMPKINS' Motion For Order To Compel Underinsured Motorist Arbitration And To Appoint A Panel Of Arbitrators is denied without prejudice to being refiled. Based on the proof of service of the petition filed by Ms. Simpkins, it appears that Ms. Simpkins sought to serve respondent State Farm per CCP 1290.4(b)(2). However, service was not properly done in accordance with that statute for two reasons. First, the proof of service does not include a return receipt. Second, less than thirty days has elapsed since the mailing of the petition to State Farm. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
